node.data: {"M8376":{"lit":"բարձ<lb xml:id=\"l104228726\" facs=\"#z104228726\" n=\"2\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>րացաւ","line":{"facs":"#z104228725","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104228725","n":"1"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8376-005b"},"n":"բարձրացաւ"},"V1294":{"lit":"բարձրա<lb xml:id=\"l104421440\" facs=\"#z104421440\" n=\"20\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>ցաւ","line":{"facs":"#z104421439","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104421439","n":"19"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9088 copy"},"n":"բարձրացաւ"},"M691":{"lit":"բարձրացաւ","line":{"facs":"#z104011318","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104011318","n":"19"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"691-134b"},"n":"բարձրացաւ"},"M7032":{"lit":"բարձր<add place=\"above\">ա<\/add>ցաւ","line":{"facs":"#z103991056","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l103991056","n":"19"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7032-029b"},"n":"բարձրացաւ"},"M695":{"lit":"բարձրացաւ","line":{"facs":"#z103912196","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l103912196","n":"4"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"695-282a"},"n":"բարձրացաւ"},"M892":{"lit":"բարձրացաւ","line":{"facs":"#z104345875","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104345875","n":"22"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"892-186a"},"n":"բարձրացաւ"},"M9307":{"lit":"բարձրացաւ","context":"text/body/ab[24]","n":"բարձրացաւ"},"M7227":{"lit":"բարձրացաւ","line":{"facs":"#z103957779","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103957779","n":"17"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7227-006a"},"n":"բարձրացաւ"},"M8699":{"lit":"բարձրացաւ","line":{"facs":"#z103940920","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l103940920","n":"14"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8699-065b"},"n":"բարձրացաւ"}}
